visual_notes: Opaque throughout — this is the key visual identifier. Takes a good polish showing vivid matte-to-waxy colors. Picture jasper is among the most visually complex natural stone materials.
prompt_fragments: picture jasper landscape imagery in stone
vibe_notes: Jasper is the most opaque and earthy of the silica minerals. It reads as matter, ground, oxidized earth — the base layer beneath everything. Its matte warmth is fundamentally different from the translucent glow of chalcedony.
folklore_summary: One of the oldest named gemstones; 'jasper' appears in texts from ancient Babylonia, Egypt, and the Hebrew Bible. Red jasper was associated with blood and warrior energy across many ancient cultures.
